insight: CompChatColor.convertLegacyToMini() uses GENERIC_DOMAIN_PATTERN which treats `*` as a URL delimiter and short TLDs like `in`, `to`, `me`. Player text like `§f*in shop` gets falsely matched as a domain, skipping legacy→MiniMessage conversion and crashing the parser. The safety net in fromMiniNative() (PR #3519) catches remaining § codes, but the root cause is the overly broad domain pattern.
